requirements.summary: Restore all comic panels that were removed in the previous version by re-adding complete panel data to comicData.ts
acceptanceCriteria: All previously existing comic panels are restored to comicData.ts
No scenes are missing when the comic is rendered in the ComicViewer
Panel sequence and chapter structure remain intact
All panel illustrations and text content are complete

file_operations.description: Restore all missing comic panels to the COMIC_DATA structure. Review the current panel count and chapter organization, then add back any panels that were removed in previous versions. Ensure all story scenes are complete with their illustration references, captions, dialogue, thoughts, and sound effects. Preserve the existing chapter structure and maintain compatibility with the localization system, deduplication features, and narration functionality. Verify that panel IDs follow the existing sequence and that all illustration filenames reference valid assets.
